## Summary

- 

## Validation

- [ ] `make lint`
- [ ] `make test`
- [ ] `make test-integration` or documented why not needed

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests cover new or changed behavior.
- [ ] Public API or scenario-format changes are documented.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` is updated.
- [ ] No target-specific strings were added to `pkg/`, `cmd/`, `examples/`, or `docs/`.
- [ ] Screenshots, logs, and fixtures contain no secrets or private data.
